title: Toki Doki
synopsis: A heart can only beat so many times in a lifetime. Kokuhaku disease, a rare condition that weakens the heart, leaves the victim with less heartbeats and a shorter lifespan than normal. With the right device, the amount of heartbeats remaining can be measured.

title: Blue Giant

title: Choking on Love
titleRomaji: Museru Kurai no Ai wo Ageru
titleNative: むせるくらいの愛をあげる
synopsis: Opposites attract in this shojo romance manga about a career-focused artist and the bad-boy guitarist who turns her world upside down! Hibari, a single-minded art student with dreams of becoming a graphic designer, feels insecure about being “ordinary” compared to her peers. Gaku, a free-spirited guitarist from the same university, turns her world upside down after a chaotic encounter at a ramen shop. Hibari wants nothing more than to escape the disorder Gaku brings to her perfectly planned life. But as he slowly breaks down her walls, Hibari starts to realize that a little chaos might be just what she needs. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Studio Cabana

synopsis: The direct sequel to Blue Giant, a manga about the evolution of the young saxophonist Dai Miyamoto in the jazz world. Blue Giant Supreme sees the hero arrive in Europe! synopsis: Meet Mimi, a college grad working part-time at a convenience store. Once an aspiring idol, she abandoned her dream when her group failed to make it big. Enter Ibuki, a rising star inspired by Mimi’s past. Their unexpected encounters reignite Mimi’s passion for the spotlight. Together, they decide to audition for a high-stakes idol competition show. Can they achieve their dreams and forge an unbreakable bond, or will the intense rivalry tear them apart? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Rock is a Lady's Modesty
titleRomaji: Rock wa Lady no Tashinami Deshite
titleNative: ロックは淑女の嗜みでして
synonyms: Rock wa Shukujo no Tashinami de shite
synopsis: When her mother marries into high society, Lilisa Suzunomiya is forced to leave her commoner ways behind. Now enrolled at an elite all-girls academy, she’s expected to smile politely, sip tea, and hang up her beloved guitar for (ugh…) a violin. But when she hears drums echoing from the old school building, Lilisa is dragged into a jam session with the secretly rebellious young lady Otoha Kurogane, and her passion for music is reignited! High society better watch out—the academy’s most demure maidens are teaming up to form an elegant rock band the likes of which the world has never seen! (Source: Yen Press)

title: Bocchi the Rock! Comic Anthology

synopsis: Hitori “Bocchi” Gotoh might find it hard to make friends, but that doesn't mean she's lacking in admirers! This rockin' anthology features a lineup of all-star guest authors ready to take the stage for the ultimate Bocchi the Rock! tribute concert! With a set list featuring hits such as “What If Bocchi Was Totally Ripped?,” “Kessoku Band Tours in Another World,” and “Hitori Gotoh vs the Police,” you'll discover new sides to your favorite characters you never even dreamed of! (Source: Yen Press) Volume 1 (2022/10/27) #Cover illustration: Chiba Sadoru #Illustrations: Matsuda Hikari, Uzaki Uso, Instant, Hoshi, Souma Hajime, HOJI, Iwawa 1. Bocchi the Rock!? (ぼっち・ざ・錠〈ロック〉!?) [Yuichi (ゆいち)] 2. Futari-chan no Okaimono Daisakusen! (ふたりちゃんのお買い物大作戦!) [Takeo Kyuujuu (タケオキュージュウ)] 3. Arigatou Guitar to Kinniku (ありがとうギターと筋肉) [Shirou Urayama] 4. title: 36: Sanjuu Roku
synopsis: Anzu, a high school girl, lives in a household where her mother has created a "perfectly controlled environment." Defying her mother’s wishes isn’t even an option. She has no smartphone, no allowance, and her only small escape is sneaking off to the listening booths at a CD shop, hidden from her mother’s watchful gaze. One fateful night, at the station’s roundabout, she encounters someone unforgettable— A “dangerous guy” with a devilish face but an angel’s touch on the guitar. Feel the chills as you dive into this deeply moving story by a 22-year-old rising star.

title: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleRomaji: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleNative: バンドをクビにされた僕と推しJKの青春リライト
synopsis: Just before their major debut, 26-year-old Shibakusa Tooru is fired by his bandmates. In the midst of his despair, he learns that his former classmate and favorite artist, Narahara Shigure, has committed suicide. With nowhere to turn, Tooru jumps off the balcony to follow her...or so he thought, but he suddenly finds himself transported back in time to his high school days. In order to change his terrible future, he must start over with his favorite high school girl in this school youth revenge story! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Love Live! flowers*: Hasu no Sora Jogakuin School Idol Club
titleRomaji: Love Live! flowers*: Hasu no Sora Jogakuin School Idol Club
titleNative: ラブライブ！flowers* -蓮ノ空女学院スクールアイドルクラブ-
synopsis: The first "Love Live!" series comic adaptation by Shueisha! Hasunosora Girls' High School, located in a remote area of Kanazawa City, Ishikawa Prefecture, beside a lake with lotus flowers in bloom. At this high school, which was founded over 100 years ago, the traditions handed down from long ago still live. This is where an energetic girl called Kaho Hinoshita enrolls with the goal of "blossoming". After being frustrated at first for not getting what she is looking for, she will discover something that will change her vision of Hasunosora: school idols.
